title: Spatial Crafter
description: Craft stuff and summon mobs with multiblock structures
body:
This mod brings new way how you can craft items and summon mobs.

Place Spatial Crafter block

Build needed structure

Spatial Crafter will consume blocks and produce outputs or summon mob

Server fiendly. Area scanning works on background thread, meaning it won't ruin your TPS.


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HVF_rwSTBj8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Easy way to add new recipes.
1. Create structure and save it with structure block

2. Create recipe json file, input is structure file location, outputs are items or entities

Checkout examples:

{
  "type": "spatialcrafter:spatial_crafting",
  "multiblock": "spatialcrafter:spatial_structures/diamond_altar.nbt",
  "processing_time": 200,
  "energy_consumption": 1000,
  "outputs": [
    {
      "item": "minecraft:diamond",
      "count": 8
    }
  ]
}
